lines.text: The Hallway, Chandler and Monica are returning from their honeymoon.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Wait. Before we go in, I just want you to know I love you. I had a great time on our honeymoon, and I can't wait to go in there and spend the rest of our life together.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You're really sticking with the shell necklace huh? (Points to necklace of shells he's wearing.)
Joey and Phoebe burst forth from his apartment.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey! You're back! (Hugs and kisses all around.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hi sweetie!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Come on in!
They grab the luggage and drag it into Joey and Rachel's forcing Monica and Chandler to follow.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: So how was the honeymoon?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, so much fun. But the best part is, we met this incredible couple on the way back.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: That was the best part? (To Chandler) Good honeymooning tiger.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No, they were really cool. They were on their honeymoon too!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: They're terrific, and they live right here in the city.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah, can we go call them? Is it too soon to call? I wanna call.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I'm sorry, we're just kinda excited because we finally have a couple to hang out with.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I know.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: A couple? Like two people? Like (points to himself) one (points to Phoebe), two people?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: This is different! Greg and Jenny are in a relationship.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, Greg and Jenny yuck! (Angrily) Hi Greg, I'm Chandler this is Monica. Hi Monica, this is Jenny. Hi Jenny. Hi Greg.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Listen, they are really great. If you just got a chance...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Y'know what? Why don't you just give us our souvenirs and get the hell out of here?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: We really...didn't get a chance to...

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You have got to be kidding me!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: We didn't get anything for anyone.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hm-mm! Yeah nice necklace!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: That you can have.
Opening Credits
{Transcriber's Note: Tradition was broken here as there were no commercials immediately after the opening credits, just more show.}
Monica and Chandler's, Ross and Rachel are entering with the rest of the gang already inside.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: All
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Welcome home.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: So, how was the honeymoon?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: It was great! It was great! How about you?! I mean you're having a baby!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh! Look! I have a sonogram picture!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh great! (Shows them the picture.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Ross! It's got your wavy black lines!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: All right, so now that Ross knows can you tell us y'know how it happened? I mean, when did it happen? How many times did it happen?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Monica! That's not right! Start with where.
Rachel looks at Ross and gets his approval.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well it happened about six weeks ago, and uh I had just got home from work and Ross was already there 'cause I guess he had been hanging out with Joey.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: You're welcome buddy.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (glaring at him) Yeah, thanks. (Joey nods no problem.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: And so I had a lot of work to do so Ross, nice guy that he is, offered to help me out. And then we had a little wine, we got to talking, and the next thing you know out of nowhere Ross comes on to me.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (laughs) Umm that's...that's a little misleading.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What is?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: The lie you just told.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: That-that you came on to me?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: There's the one!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: But you did! I mean, let's be honest.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yes let's. Y'know what? Uh, it's-it's not important. What is important is that, is that we're having a baby. And it's not-Doesn't matter who came on to who.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Whom. (Everyone looks at him shocked.) That's right.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: You know you kissed me first.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What? What?! You were begging me to kiss you! You-you-you were sending me signals all over the place!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I was sending you signals?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh please. Okay, anyone in this room think that I would send Ross begging symbols, please show of hands. (Ross raises his hand and no one else.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Y'know what?! It doesn't matter! It doesn't matter what you believe! What matters is what happened!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay. So these signals Ross, explain this to me, 'cause maybe I need to be more careful. I mean, am I sending you these signals right now?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Y'know what? Y'know what? Rachel, just-just drop it.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No please, show me how I begged you!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I can show you, I have it on videotape! (Stunned silence) It's an expression.
Commercial Break
Monica and Chandler's, time has lapsed, Phoebe, Joey, Chandler, and Monica are sitting at the kitchen table.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I can't believe he taped the two of them having sex!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah! You gotta tell a girl before you tape her. Such a rookie mistake.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Y'know who has a great video camera?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (nasally) Greg and Jenny?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Do you still wanna call 'em? I wanna call 'em.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Let's call 'em.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah! Ask them if they brought their friends any souvenirs!
Monica goes over and dials their number.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (on phone) Hello? (Listens) Eighth street deli?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey, hang up! You get food poisoning just talkin' to that place.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (on phone) Uh sorry, wrong number. (Hangs up)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Here you go. (Shows her the number again.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (on phone) Hello? (Listens) (To All) It's the deli again!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: All right! I'll have a sandwich!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (hangs up) I don't think this number's right!
Joey and Phoebe laugh.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You got fake numbered.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What?! People don't do that!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh I think we do.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: They gave us a fake number? Why? Why would they do that?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I don't know! You were a delight to talk to. You asked all those insightful, great questions.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: And you've never been funnier. Joke, joke, joke, you were a hoot!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Y'know what? Don't worry about it, you still got me and Phoebe.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Excuse me, I don't want Greg and Jenny's rejects.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (entering) Rachel won't talk to me! She won't even open the door!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hmm, I wonder why. Pervert!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay, listen I am not a pervert!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: That's like the pervert motto! Yeah! Yeah! They have you raise your right hand, put your left hand down your pants, and repeat that!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Filming Rachel is not something I planned. Okay look, here's what happened, and Joey you-you can back me up on this. All right, about-about a month and a half ago I came to you with a problem? Umm, a personal thing.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Personal thing? What personal thing? I don't know.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: About...about sex? (Joey looks at him confused) That I hadn't had sex in months?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (laughs) Yeah I knew what you were talkin' about.
Six Weeks Earlier
Joey and Rachel's, Joey is reading a cereal box as Ross enters wearing the red sweater.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Do you have a minute? I'd like to talk to you about something I'm, I'm really uncomfortable talking about.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Sure. What? About uh, you showering with your mom?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I actually had a topic in mind! I'm, I'm kinda going through a dry spell, sex wise.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Whoa, for like months?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Five to be lying, six.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Six months? Whoa that's rough.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well, I mean it's not all bad. I'm learning to appreciate the uh, smaller things in life. Like the sound of a bird and the color of the sky.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: The sky's blue Ross and I had sex yesterday!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Please, help me! I have a date tonight. It has to go well okay-I'm scared for my health!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay. Okay. Umm...Ooh! Oh-oh, I got something. It's this story I came up with, very romantic. I swear any woman that hears it; they're like putty.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Really? Well then tell it to me.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay. Now you're gonna want to have sex with me when you hear it, but you have to remember it is just the story.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (sarcastic) I'll try to control myself.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay. (Clears throat) Years ago, when I was backpacking across Western Europe...

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (laughs) You were backpacking across Western Europe?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Have a nice six more months Ross! (Starts to leave.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (stopping him) Okay! Okay! Okay. I'm sorry. Please, please, you were in Western Europe and?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I was just outside Barcelona hiking in the foothills of Mount Tibidabo. I was at the end of this path and I came to a clearing and there was a lake, very secluded. And there were tall trees all around. (Whispering) It was dead silent. Gorgeous. (Softly) And across the lake I saw...a beautiful woman...bathing herself...but she was crying...

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (intently listening) Why?
Ross's Apartment, Ross is on his date with Kristen and they're drinking wine.

lines.speaker: Kristen
lines.text: Umm, this is great wine.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: It's from France...In Europe...Western Europe. Y'know umm, a few years ago I actually was backpacking across Western Europe.

lines.speaker: Kristen
lines.text: Really?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Uh-hmm-Wait! It gets better. Um, yeah I was in Barcelona.

lines.speaker: Kristen
lines.text: I studied for a year in Barcelona. (Ross is stunned and worried.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Anyway, umm so I was um, I was hiking...

lines.speaker: Kristen
lines.text: I love hiking!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (whines) Oh that's great! I was hiking along the foothills of Mount Tibidaybo...

lines.speaker: Kristen
lines.text: I think its Tibidabo.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay! Do you wanna tell the story?!
Joey and Rachel's, Joey is standing at the counter as Ross enters.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Whoa! What are you doing here? How did your date go?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Great! I'm across the street having sex with her right now. Your story sucks!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey! Look, if it didn't work it's because you didn't tell it right! Show me how you did it.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No! No, I don't...don't want to.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: How long since you've seen a girl naked?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I was backpacking across Western Europe.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I'm not feeling it.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I was just outside Barcelona, hiking...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No! No! No Ross! I'm not hot! Are you hot?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: It's been six months! I'm always hot!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well you're not selling the story! It's like; it's like you don't believe it! Look, I gotta go. I got a date, but try this. Do what I do when I'm preparing for an audition. Okay? I'll set you up with my video camera and you can record yourself and-and see what you're doing wrong.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I'll try that.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: All right now... All right, you're all set up. You're good to go. Just hit record. All right?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Thanks.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Good luck.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Thanks. And-and hey Joe?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Listen, if you ever have any problem with the ladies you know I'll help you out.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (trying not to laugh) That means a lot to me man. (Exits.)
Ross pours himself a glass of wine, hits record, and sits down in front of the camera.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hello! Can I get you anything? Huh? Lens cleaner? Your battery okay? (Rachel bursts in carrying two boxes and Ross jumps up.) Rachel!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh Ross!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Thank God you're here! You have to help me! Were you just talking to yourself?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: That's less embarrassing, yes. Yes I was.
They sit down on the couch, which is in front of the still recording camera.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (voiceover) So when she came in, I got distracted and totally forgot about the camera. [Cut back to the present day.] It kept rolling and recorded everything.
Pause

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah, we're gonna need to see that tape. (They rest of them agree.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah, definitely.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What a great idea! That will get Rachel to forgive me!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Y'know what? This is not fair to her. Let's just forget the tape!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Thank you. (Joey mouths to Ross, "You'll show me right?") No!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: You're right. (Mouths, "I know you'll show me, right?)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Joey! No!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Loud and clear! (Mouths, "You'll show me," and nods.)
Ross storms out.
Monica and Chandler's, Monica, Chandler, Joey, and Phoebe are now sitting in the living room.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I still don't get why Greg and Jenny would give us a fake number.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Y'know, if they knew what they were doing they probably didn't give you real names either.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay, maybe people give out fake numbers, but they don't give out fake names.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh yeah? (To Phoebe) Hi, Ken Adams, nice to meet you.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Regina Philange. (Ken and Regina shake hands.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I still don't get it, we didn't do anything wrong.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I know! Although, you did tell an awful lot of jokes.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I thought you said those jokes were funny. Joke! Joke! Joke!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (rolling her head from side to side) Joke. Joke. Blah! Blah! (Joey and Phoebe laugh.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well maybe it was all of your questions.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What about my questions?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: The sheer volume, it was like flying with the Riddler!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, I'm sorry. Was that another joke?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (angrily) Was that another question?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (entering) Hey! Is Ross still here?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Uh no Rach, he's gone. But listen, he told us what happened and it does, it sounds like an honest mistake.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh really? Well how would you like it if I had sex with you and I taped it? (Joey smiles luridly) Oh forget it! (Ross enters.) Oh there he is now, the father of my child, the porn king of the west village.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Look, it was accident! Okay? I-I feel bad that it happened, but I swear, I didn't even watch it! Anyway, here. (He takes the tape out of his coat pocket.) I thought you might be more comfortable destroying it yourself. (Tosses her the tape.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Thank you. (She sets it on the floor and is about to stomp on it with her shoe when the rest of the gang jumps up and yells simultaneously.) What? (They all yell again.) You don't want to see this do you?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hell yeah!!!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I am not gonna show you this!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No! Not the sex part, just the stuff leading up to it.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Forget it, she's destroying it.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay fine! Fine! We'll just have to think of some other way to put the whole 'Who came onto who,' thing to rest! Come on now, think!!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Look, forget it Phoebe. Okay? It's Rachel's tape and she can do whatever she wants with it. And she wants to destroy it. So, end of story.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I wanna see it.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Clearly you don't want people to see this tape. Now I don't want people to see this tape either, but you so badly don't people to see it makes me want to see it. You see?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (confused) Are we watchin' the tape or not?!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I don't want people to see it for your sake.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ahh, I don't believe you. I think you don't want them to see you begging me. (Goes to put the tape in the VCR)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Rachel, please...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ah, a little preview!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Fine. Fine, but I want the record to show that I tried to take the high road, because in about five minutes I'm gonna be saying...(He laughs and points at Rachel sarcastically.)
They both sit down.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay, here we go. (Pushes play.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (on tape) Hello! Can I get you anything?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (To Phoebe) I'm so happy!
Commercial Break
Monica and Chandler's, the scene is continued from earlier.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (on tape) Oh, thank God you're here! You have to help me! Were you just talking to yourself?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: There I am.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You're gonna get pregnant.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (on tape) I screwed up so bad, I told Monica that I would stuff and send all these wedding invitations like weeks ago and I-I...

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (on tape) You didn't do it?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (on tape) I-I know-I had put them in...in-in my desk at work and I completely forgot about them until today.
Chandler is shocked and Rachel gets scared of Monica very quickly.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (taking Rachel's hand) Sweetie okay. It's okay. Everybody made it to the wedding. I'm fine.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Kinda hurtin' my hand though.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I know.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (on tape) (Ross hands her a glass of wine) I cannot believe that I did this. Especially after Monica just went on and on and on about it! (Mimicking Monica) "Okay Rachel! Here are the invitations Rachel! Now be very careful Rachel! Please, drinking no liquids around the invitations Rachel!" (She tilts her wine glass above and moves it back and forth across the invitations) Whoa oh! Oh-oh-oh! Oh...oh-oh-oh...
Rachel hits fast forward. Monica is completely shocked.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Did you do it on our invitations?!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (pause) Not on the ones we sent out.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: So, just the ones gave back to us and we had framed! (Slams the framed invitation down onto the table.)
Rachel stops fast forwarding.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (on tape) Can you believe this is already happening? I mean it seems like yesterday they just got engaged.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (on tape) I know. Hey remember...remember the night they got engaged? How uh, you and I almost...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (on tape) Oh, I remember how we almost. Do you think we would've gone through with it? Y'know, if we hadn't gotten caught. Do you think we would've done it?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (on tape) I mean I...I know I wanted to. I just, I just wasn't sure if you wanted to.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (on tape) Oh I wanted to.
Ross and Rachel trade looks while watching the tape.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (on tape) So we...we both wanted to.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (on tape) Interesting.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (on tape) Yeah. (Pause) Anyway umm, it probably worked out for the best.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (on tape) Oh yeah, sure.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay, in about ten seconds you're gonna see him kiss me.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: And in about five seconds you're gonna see why.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (on tape) Ross did I ever tell you about the time that I went backpacking through Western Europe?
Joey's shocked and everyone else looks at Rachel.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay, get ready to see some beggin'!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, you came on to Ross!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Now I'm so happy.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What are you talking about?!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You used the Europe story!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: That's the magic story you use when you wanna have sex!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: How do you know about that story?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: How do you know about that story?!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I heard it from my friend Irene who heard it from some guy!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (raises his hand) Some guy!! (Points to himself.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No. No, she told me his name was Ken Adams.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (raises his hand and points to himself again) Ken Adams!!
Joey and Rachel's, Rachel is looking at the tape sitting on the counter as Ross enters.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hi.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: So uh, apparently people are familiar with the Europe story?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah. Listen about that, the whole uh, who came on to who thing really doesn't matter. I mean, I think it would've happened either way. I mean if you hadn't initiated it I-I-I know I would've.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: It was an amazing night.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: It was. It was an amazing night.
Pause

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: You think it looked amazing?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I uh... I don't know. I mean I...I honestly didn't watch it.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah, me neither. Yet...

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Uhhhhhh...that-that may be weird.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah, it would be really weird.
Ross grabs the tape and heads for the VCR as Rachel goes over and puts the chain on the door and locks it.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Good luck.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Good luck to you.
Ross pushes play.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Mind if I mute?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh please. (He does so.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh, oh there go the clothes.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: You are undressing very quickly.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Six months Rachel, six months.

lines.speaker: Ross and Rachel
lines.text: Ah. (Pause) Oh.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey. We-we look...we look pretty good.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: That's what I was gonna say.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh nice tan!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Thank you! I had just gone to the beach that weekend.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Have you been working out?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I have been working out.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Really? Wow, this is so much better than I...

lines.speaker: Ross and Rachel
lines.text: Ohh! Ew!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh that's not pretty.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh! Oh!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh God!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh no!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, make it stop!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh no!!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Make it stop!!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No!!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Have to make it stop!!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No!!!
They both get out of the chair and run for the VCR.
Closing Credits
Monica and Chandler's, Monica and Chandler have gone through the phone book and found Greg and Jenny's number which Monica has just dialed.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (on phone) Hello Greg? (Listens) Hi, this is Monica from the plane? Listen, the number that you gave me 853-5... (Listens) (To Chandler) That is their old number! Jenny's been giving it out since they moved!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Jenny! That is so Jenny!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (on phone) Hey listen umm, how would you like to get together? Say next Saturday? (Listens) Okay, how about Sunday? (Listens) Okay umm, the week after that? (Listens) The week after that? (Listens) Y'know what Greg? Y'know what? We are good, interesting, funny people with good questions and if you and your precious Jenny can't see that then... (Listens) January 15th? (Chandler dances.) We'll see you then! (Listens) Okay!
She hangs up the phone and they hug.
End
